title: Fermented Creamy Ukrainian Butter Gratin
description: A rich and creamy gratin featuring the tangy flavors of fermented cream and the warmth of Ukrainian spices.
instructions: In a cataplana, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add 1 small onion, diced, and saut5 2-3 minutes until translucent.
Add 2 cloves of garlic, minced, and cook for 1 minute.
Add 1 cup of fermented heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Sprinkle 1/2 cup of shredded cheddar cheese and 1/4 cup of chopped fresh dill over the top of the gratin.
Transfer the cataplana to the oven and bake at 37500 for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cream is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
